topicName: Expanded Form and Word Form (4-digit Numbers)
description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for expanded and word form of 4-digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent place value and basic expanded/word form knowledge, can focus on 4-digit applications

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready with good foundation, provide complete coverage of both expanded and word forms

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in place value and/or basic expanded/word form, needs review before 4-digit content

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant prerequisite review in place value and basic expanded/word form

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with expanded and word form.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

word_form_basics.conceptName: Reading and writing numbers in words

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: Write 3,456 in expanded form.
questions.explanation: 3,456 = 3000 + 400 + 50 + 6. Each digit is shown with its place value.

ifAllCorrect.message: Great! You understand expanded form well.

ifAllWrong.reason: Student still struggling with expanded form concept

questions.question: What is 2,735 in words?
questions.explanation: 2,735 is read as 'Two thousand seven hundred thirty-five'.

questions.question: Which number is 'Five thousand forty-two'?
questions.explanation: 'Five thousand forty-two' = 5,042. Note: there are no hundreds.

ifAllCorrect.reason: Student ready for challenge problems with all forms

ifAllWrong.message: Review word form video before continuing

skip_ahead.action: Skip remaining basic videos, jump to integration or challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review videos

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend additional practice exercises before practice quiz

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You have strong understanding of place value and expanded form. We've created a fast-track playlist focusing on 4-digit expanded and word forms with challenges.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand place value and basic expanded form. Let's extend this to 4-digit numbers with complete coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in prerequisite knowledge. Don't worry! We'll start with review videos on place value and basic expanded/word form, then move to 4-digit numbers.

low_score.message: You need to review prerequisite concepts first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation in place value and number forms. After watching, you can retake the quiz.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how number forms build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 70% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

formConversion.description: % of students who can convert between all three forms correctly

wordFormAccuracy.description: % of students who can write 4-digit numbers in words correctly

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 30-35 minutes with 85-95% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 40-45 minutes with 75-85% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 45-50 minutes with 65-75% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (40 min) + retake + main content (25 min) = 65-75 total minutes, expected 55-70% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students confusing expanded form with standard form (writing 3456 instead of 3000+400+50+6)
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasis on using + signs and showing place values explicitly
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students struggling with word form of numbers with zeros (5,007)
commonChallenges.solution2: Specific examples showing how to handle zeros in different places
commonChallenges.challenge3: Students adding extra zeros when converting word form to standard (writing 5,0042 for 'five thousand forty-two')
commonChallenges.solution3: Practice place value positions and understanding which places have zeros
